name: GAS STATION W SNOW
description: Gas station at night in the snow — moody cinematic, neon reflections, cold weather fashion.
asset_requirements: Upload front and back of your full outfit. Logo optional. Clean backgrounds preferred.

input_manifest.label: Front Top + Bottoms
input_manifest.hint: Front view of the full outfit on a clean background.

input_manifest.label: Back Top + Bottoms
input_manifest.hint: Back view of the full outfit.

input_manifest.label: Logo
input_manifest.hint: Brand logo — will appear in the gas station environment.

steps.prompt: Cinematic fashion photography at a snowy gas station at night. A model wearing the full outfit — front and back details shown — stands under harsh fluorescent gas station lights with snow falling around them. The brand logo glows somewhere in the scene. Cinematic color grade, cold blue atmosphere, streetwear energy.

Gas station snow cinematic video. Model wearing the clothing walks slowly through heavy snowfall under a gas station canopy, snow blowing around them, neon reflections on the ground, breath visible, the clothing moves naturally in the wind, moody cinematic camera movement.
